_comment: Copy this file to config.json and set PIXAI_API_KEY. config.json is git-ignored and will never be committed.
_comment_api_key: THE ONLY VALUE YOU NEED. Your official API key from platform.pixai.art (lifetime up to ~2 years). Sent as the Bearer credential for ALL calls. Your USER_ID is auto-resolved from it, and the persisted-query hashes below ship with working defaults -- so with just this key, everything works. Nothing else here is required unless a default stops working.
_comment_optional: EVERYTHING BELOW IS OPTIONAL. Leave as-is. The hashes are public identifiers of PixAI's own frontend GraphQL ops (not secrets, not per-user); they ship baked-in and only need a value here if PixAI overhauls their frontend and a built-in default goes stale (you'll get a clear 'recapture' error if so).
_comment_user_id: Optional override. Auto-resolved from the API key via the `me` query; only set this to pin a specific id.
_comment_hashes: Optional overrides for the baked-in persisted-query hashes (feed / task-detail / delete). Capture from DevTools -> Network -> graphql -> the matching request -> Payload -> extensions.persistedQuery.sha256Hash, only if a default rotates.
_comment_legacy: DEPRECATED legacy fallback for users WITHOUT an API key. U3T is the 'u3t' field from a graphql request Payload; the short-lived Bearer token then goes in token.txt / PIXAI_TOKEN / --token and must be re-captured every few hours. Leave blank when using PIXAI_API_KEY (recommended).
